title: Storage & Encryption Layer (AES-GCM-256, PBKDF2 600K, IndexedDB wrapper)
description: Implement the encrypted storage layer in lib/storage/. Key derivation: PBKDF2-SHA-256 with 600 000 iterations (OWASP 2023). Symmetric cipher: AES-GCM-256. IV: crypto.getRandomValues(12) — never reused per key. Derived keys held in memory only, never persisted. IndexedDB wrapper for structured objects (Genome, product cache). chrome.storage.local adapter for small settings. Exported API: encrypt(), decrypt(), put(), get(), del(), wipe(). Unit tests for every encryption path (TDD).
